mapper.select: select i.id, i.item_store_id, i.item_category_id, i.item_name, i.item_price, i.item_stock, i.item_content, i.item_delivery_fee, i.item_view_count, i.item_state, i.item_type, i.created_datetime, i.updated_datetime, s.store_name, c.category_name, (select f.file_saved_path from tbl_file_item fi join tbl_file f on fi.id = f.id where fi.item_id = i.id and fi.file_item_type = 'THUMBNAIL' order by fi.id asc limit 1) as item_image_url from tbl_item i left join tbl_store s on i.item_store_id = s.id left join tbl_category c on i.item_category_id = c.id where (i.item_state = 'ACTIVE' or i.item_state is null) order by i.created_datetime desc limit #{limit}

select i.id, i.item_store_id, i.item_category_id, i.item_name, i.item_price, i.item_stock, i.item_content, i.item_delivery_fee, i.item_view_count, i.item_state, i.item_type, i.created_datetime, i.updated_datetime, s.store_name, c.category_name, (select f.file_saved_path from tbl_file_item fi join tbl_file f on fi.id = f.id where fi.item_id = i.id and fi.file_item_type = 'THUMBNAIL' order by fi.id asc limit 1) as item_image_url from tbl_item i left join tbl_store s on i.item_store_id = s.id left join tbl_category c on i.item_category_id = c.id where (i.item_state = 'ACTIVE' or i.item_state is null) order by i.item_view_count desc, i.created_datetime desc limit #{limit}
